ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the region */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* Time zone offset from UTC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., solver, partner, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the partnership belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the partnership */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the partnership */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the partnership was initiated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the partnership ends (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the partnership */,
  "value" TEXT /* Monetary value of the partnership */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the partnership (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the partnership */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the partnership */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the stage in the partnership process */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the stage is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnership_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partnership being updated */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the partnership at the time of update */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_stage" TEXT /* Previous stage of the partnership before the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnership_history_partnership_id FOREIGN KEY ("partnership_id") REFERENCES partnerships ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnership_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the partnership */,
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partnership being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of interaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for interaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user at the time of interaction (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_partnership_id FOREIGN KEY ("partnership_id") REFERENCES partnerships ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
